tasks.title: Scaffold pi-extension-utils repo
tasks.description: git init, package.json (pi extension entry ./index.ts, shape from pi-subagents), tsconfig, node --test setup

tasks.title: Implement host face (index.ts)
tasks.description: On activate emit pi-extension-utils:ready; listen hello/register/unregister/fullscreen; one host widget per placement rendering sub-widgets sorted by (order, insertion); fullscreen.acquire hides slot, release/dispose restores

tasks.title: Implement client lib + logger
tasks.description: Handshake (hello/ready) with fallback to direct ctx.ui.setWidget; widgets.set/remove; fullscreen.acquire()->release; createLogger(ns) writing ~/.pi/logs/<ns>.log with rotation; protocolVersion in payloads

tasks.title: Migrate pi-subagents to coordinator
tasks.description: Async widget via coordinator; openSubagentsStatus wraps ui.custom in fullscreen.acquire/release; delete rowsBelow hack in subagents-status.ts. Confirm interim-fix commit with user first.
tasks.context: APPROACH CHANGED per user: no vendoring. Publish pi-extension-utils to npm (user logged in as baris5; name free) and consume as a real dependency in pi-subagents. New sub-steps: (a) add tsc build -> dist/ with JS+.d.ts, point main/exports at dist, compile pi.extensions entry too (Node refuses type-stripping inside node_modules, so shipping raw .ts would break pi-subagents tests); (b) verify+commit; (c) npm publish 0.1.0; (d) in pi-subagents: npm i pi-extension-utils, shared connect() client at activation, replace direct ctx.ui.setWidget for async-runs widget, fullscreen lease around dashboard in slash-commands.ts openSubagentsStatus, delete height hack in subagents-status.ts. Repo B still NO git add/commit/stash. Fixer run 3bf74cc0 was interrupted mid-flight but its repo-A commit 949a858 (fallback fullscreen leases + tests) landed; repo B untouched.

tasks.title: Verify gates in both repos
tasks.description: pi-extension-utils: own tests. pi-subagents: npm run test:unit (769), bash scripts/charter-tsc-no-new-errors.sh (0 new vs 275), npm run check:source-vocabulary. Live test: /subagents-status with pi-bar.
